chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 311 - وَقَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ أَخَذَ مِنْ أَظْفَارِهِ كُلَّ يَوْمِ خَمِيسٍ ' لَمْ يَرْمَدْ وَلَدُهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.311 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"Whoever trims their nails every Thursday, their child will not suffer from eye ailments”.
